title: Failed to confirm appointment cancellation
evidence: I thought I had cancelled it already. Did that not get processed?
should_have: The agent should have checked the appointment status and confirmed whether the cancellation was processed or not.

title: Ignored patient's repeated request for appointment status
evidence: Are you seeing it scheduled still?
should_have: The agent should have addressed the patient's concern about the appointment status directly instead of offering to connect to another team.

title: Disconnected conversation without resolution
evidence: Connecting you to a representative. Please. Wait. Hello.
should_have: The agent should have provided a smoother transition or explanation instead of abruptly disconnecting the conversation.

title: Sounded robotic and scripted
evidence: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
should_have: The agent should have used a more natural tone and engaged more personally with the patient.
